name: RPlog_Trust_Decay
title: Trust & Decay: The Unraveling of Ash
summary: This chronicle recaps the slow disillusionment of the Nagai woman Nitisha, operating under the guise of 'Ash,' during her service to the crime figure Tritus Vaticus on Tatooine and Ord Mantell. After taking a place at Tritus's side and rebuilding his Gundark operations, Ash endures his apparent death at the hands of Thrask, his unexpected resurrection, and his growing, unexplained violence, gradually realizing her loyalty and feelings are unrequited. Feeling used and taken for granted, she courts quiet rebellion--befriending the half-breed Sekes, selling information behind Tritus's back, and preparing to slip away to her old gypsy life. Her world collapses during a chaotic confrontation involving the Sith Lords Anatoli Black and Darth Malign, an orbital bombardment of Mos Eisley, and her abandonment by Tritus; left buried in rubble, she is rescued, confronts Sekes, and is ultimately drawn aboard Darth Malign's shuttle to an uncertain fate.
